subcodes.first_line: One of the servants of God presented thy letter and read it before the Wronged One. We heard it and respond unto thee with that which He loveth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر عبد من عباد الله بکتابکم و قراه لدی المظلوم سمعنا و اجبناک بما یحبه منه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
